issues: 2nd DiGAV amendment in force 1 February 2026 confirmed via BMG
AbEM 20% requirement confirmed by BMG source

Internal chronology confusion: article states 'BfArM veröffentlicht AbEM-Ergebnisse ab 1. Januar 2026' but the amendment entered into force on 1. Februar 2026. The 20%-dependency applies to permanent remuneration amounts from 1 January 2026 (via transitional provision), while the amendment as a whole entered into force on 1 February 2026. The current text makes it appear the BfArM was publishing results before the law was even in force.
articles.fixInstructions: Clarify the AbEM paragraph: the 20% performance-dependency applies to DiGA with permanent remuneration amounts from 1. Januar 2026 (per transitional provisions), while the amendment as a whole entered into force 1. Februar 2026. Rewrite to avoid the apparent contradiction, e.g.: 'Die Zweite Änderungsverordnung trat am 1. Februar 2026 in Kraft. Für DiGA mit dauerhaftem Erstattungsbetrag gilt die 20%-Anforderung bereits ab 1. Januar 2026. Das BfArM veröffentlicht die AbEM-Ergebnisse fortlaufend im DiGA-Verzeichnis.'

Sector count: article states 9 sectors. KRITIS-DachG (CER Directive transposition) covers 11 sectors including Weltraum/Space and Öffentliche Verwaltung, not 9. BSI-BSIG previously had 9 sectors but the KRITIS-DachG expands the list to align with CER Directive
articles.fixInstructions: Update sector count: the KRITIS-DachG aligned with the CER Directive (EU 2022/2557) covers 11 sectors (adding Weltraum/Space and expanding Öffentliche Verwaltung). The article lists 9 — check against the KRITIS-DachG text and update accordingly. Add a source for the 17 July 2026 registration deadline.

November 2003 (in Kraft seit 1. Januar 2004)'.

Claim 'eu-LISA mitbetrieben': search results do not confirm eu-LISA as co-operator of MyHealth@EU. Official EC sources describe governance via the eHealth Operational Management Board (eHOMB) under the European Commission's DG SANTE. eu-LISA manages other EU IT systems (SIS, VIS, Eurodac) but is not identified as an operator of eHDSI/MyHealth@EU in the searched sources

articles.fixInstructions: Remove or correct the eu-LISA co-operator claim. Official EC sources show MyHealth@EU is operated by the European Commission (DG SANTE) via the eHOMB governance structure. Change 'wird von der EU-Behörde für das Management von IT-Diensten (eu-LISA) mitbetrieben' to 'wird von der Europäischen Kommission (DG SANTE) betrieben'. Add a source for Austria's February 2026 e-prescription participation.
